bullets: Owned SOX-compliance IRDR workflows — researched 1,000+ inventory discrepancies and built the data systems behind Sarbanes-Oxley audit requirements.
Built SQL and Excel reporting for inventory accuracy and defect visibility; delivered dashboards and recurring leadership reports.
Created an Anthropic-powered SQL copilot that references every available data table for analysts.
Shipped an autonomous root-cause bot that performs end-to-end inventory research.
